name: Ryan Corner Wind Farm
notable: 52x Vestas V150-4.2MW. Snowy Hydro PPA. Owned by GPG/Naturgy. Decmil/RJE JV BOP. Opened Dec 2024.

timeline.title: EPBC Referral 2005/2142
timeline.detail: Ryan Corner Wind Farm — Not Controlled Action

timeline.title: Construction commenced
timeline.detail: WestWind Energy began construction in western Victoria

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

eis_specs.document_title: Ryan Corner Wind Farm Environment Effects Statement (VIC DEECA EES)
eis_specs.hub_height_note: Standard 125 m hub for V150-4.2 on Western VIC terrain near Hamilton
eis_specs.wind_speed_period: Mean annual wind speed at hub height; Western Victoria near Hamilton — from on-site met mast and ERA5
eis_specs.energy_yield_method: WAsP with ERA5 long-term correction; P50 net yield
eis_specs.connection_substation_name: Ryan Corner 220 kV substation (new, on-site), near Hamilton, Western Victoria
eis_specs.connection_distance_note: ~10 km of 220 kV connection to AusNet Services South-West Victoria 220 kV network near Hamilton.
eis_specs.connection_augmentation: New 220 kV substation and connection line. AusNet augmented the Hamilton/Portland corridor for Ryan Corner and adjacent projects.
eis_specs.notes: 218 MW (52 x 4.2 MW Vestas V150), Western Victoria near Hamilton. Developer: Pacific Hydro (PowAR). BOP: Decmil/RJE JV. VIC EES approved 2020. Now operating (2023). SW VIC coastal plains provide excellent wind resource.
